pattern.imageEvidence: clean rental bedroom with linen reset and host checklist
pattern.styleContract: Host-ready calm with linen-reset proof, real turnover cleaning evidence, golden booking accents, and a scope receipt table as the signature move.

hero.title: Turnkey Tidy vacation rental turnover hero image
hero.alt: A vacation rental turnover cleaner finishing a bright guest bedroom with crisp linens, a restock tray, checklist clipboard, and tidy entry details.

contact.serviceArea: Vacation rental turnovers, linen swaps, restock checks, kitchen and bath reset, entry photos, damage notes, same-day changeovers, and host coverage for guest suites, cabins, lake homes, and short-term rentals across the local booking corridor

copy.eyebrow: Vacation rental turnover with receipt-level proof
copy.heroTitle: Guest-ready before the next door code goes live.
copy.heroText: Turnkey Tidy resets beds, baths, kitchens, entry details, linens, and restocks with clear host notes so every turnover feels tracked, not guessed.
copy.introTitle: What gets checked between checkout and check-in
copy.introText: We confirm linens, supply levels, trash, dishes, surfaces, entry details, damage clues, laundry timing, and photos before marking a unit guest-ready.
copy.proofTitle: Host proof without a scavenger hunt
copy.quoteText: Send property type, bed/bath count, linen setup, average checkout window, and restock expectations. We will reply with a clear coverage plan and first-turnover notes.

services.title: Guest Room Reset
services.text: Beds made, linens staged, surfaces cleaned, visible floors checked, and room details reset for the next arrival.

services.title: Kitchen And Bath Pass
services.text: Counters, sinks, toilets, showers, mirrors, dishes, trash, and easy-to-miss guest touchpoints checked with host notes.

services.title: Restock And Photo Notes
services.text: Supply levels, damage flags, entry details, and completion photos sent so remote hosts can see what changed.

process.title: Confirm the calendar
process.text: We review checkout time, lock access, laundry setup, restock list, and anything guests mentioned before the visit.

process.title: Reset by room
process.text: The clean moves through bedrooms, baths, kitchen, entry, outdoor touchpoints, trash, and final smell/visual checks.

process.title: Send host proof
process.text: You get completion notes, restock flags, damage concerns, and photo proof before the next guest arrives.

proof.label: low supplies called out before guests do
